secret_settings.secret_created_description: Your vault item is now available at the following URL. Keep your decryption key safe, as it cannot be recovered.

secret_settings.failed_to_burn: Failed to vanish vault item. Please try again.

security_settings.security_description: Configure security settings for your vault item
security_settings.private_description: Private vault items are encrypted and can only be viewed with the decryption key, and/or passphrase.
security_settings.expiration_burn_after_time_description: Set when the vault item should be destroyed
security_settings.expiration_default_description: Set how long the vault item should be available
security_settings.burn_after_time_mode_description: The vault item will be destroyed after the time lifetime ends, regardless of how many times it's viewed.
security_settings.password_protection_description: Add an additional layer of security with a passphrase
security_settings.password_hint: Minimum 5 characters. Recipients will need this passphrase to view the vault item
security_settings.password_error: Passphrase must be at least 5 characters
security_settings.ip_restriction_description: The CIDR input will allow users to specify IP address ranges that can access the vault item.
security_settings.ip_address_cidr_hint: Only requests from these IP addresses will be able to access the vault item
security_settings.burn_after_time_description: Vanish the vault item only after the time lifetime ends

title_field.hint: Give your vault item a memorable title (optional)

security_settings.title: Security Settings

two_factor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
two_factor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
two_factor.enter_password_to_enable: Enter your passphrase to enable two-factor authentication.
two_factor.scan_qr_code: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
two_factor.manual_entry_hint: Or manually enter this code in your authenticator app:
two_factor.enter_verification_code: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify setup.
two_factor.disable_warning: Disabling 2FA will make your account less secure. You'll need to enter your passphrase to confirm.
two_factor.invalid_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
two_factor.enable_error: Failed to enable 2FA. Please try again.
two_factor.verify_error: Failed to verify 2FA code. Please try again.
two_factor.disable_error: Failed to disable 2FA. Please try again.
two_factor.backup_codes_description: Save these backup codes in a safe place. You can use them to access your account if you lose access to your authenticator app.
two_factor.backup_codes_warning: Each code can only be used once. Store them securely!

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.delete_account_description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. This will permanently delete your account, all your vault items, and remove all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
danger_zone.delete_account_bullet1: All your vault items will be permanently deleted
danger_zone.delete_account_bullet2: Your account data will be removed from our servers
danger_zone.delete_account_bullet3: Any shared vault item links will become invalid
danger_zone.delete_account_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

organization_page.title: Organization Settings
organization_page.description: Configure organization-wide settings and access controls

registration_settings.title: Registration Settings
registration_settings.description: Control how users can join your organization
registration_settings.invite_only_description: Users can only register with a valid invite code
registration_settings.require_registered_user_description: Only registered users can create vault items
registration_settings.disable_email_password_signup_descriptio: Disable registration with email and passphrase (social login only)
registration_settings.allowed_domains_description: Only allow registration from specific email domains (comma-separated, e.g., company.com, org.net)
registration_settings.allowed_domains_hint: Comma-separated list of email domains. Leave empty to allow all domains.

invite_codes.title: Invite Codes
invite_codes.description: Create and manage invitation codes for new users
invite_codes.no_invites_description: Create an invite code to allow new users to register

invites_page.title: Invite Codes
invites_page.description: Manage invite codes for new user registrations

delete_modal.title: Deactivate Invite Code
delete_modal.message: Are you sure you want to deactivate invite code {{code}}? This action cannot be undone.

setup_page.title: Welcome to NOVA
setup_page.description: Create your admin account to get started
setup_page.success: Admin account created successfully! Please log in.
setup_page.password_too_short: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters
setup_page.note: This setup can only be completed once. The admin account will have full access to manage this instance.

webhook_settings.title: Webhook Notifications
webhook_settings.description: Notify external services when vault items are viewed or burned
webhook_settings.enable_webhooks_description: Send HTTP POST requests to your webhook URL when events occur
webhook_settings.webhook_url_hint: The URL where webhook payloads will be sent
webhook_settings.webhook_secret_placeholder: Enter a vault item for HMAC signing
webhook_settings.webhook_secret_hint: Used to sign webhook payloads with HMAC-SHA256. The signature is sent in the X-NOVA-Signature header.
webhook_settings.on_view_description: Send a webhook when a vault item is viewed
webhook_settings.on_burn_description: Send a webhook when a vault item is burned or deleted

metrics_settings.title: Prometheus Metrics
metrics_settings.description: Expose metrics for monitoring with Prometheus
metrics_settings.enable_metrics_description: Expose a /api/metrics endpoint for Prometheus scraping
metrics_settings.metrics_secret_placeholder: Enter a vault item for authentication
metrics_settings.metrics_secret_hint: Used as a Bearer token to authenticate requests to the metrics endpoint. Leave empty for no authentication (not recommended).
metrics_settings.endpoint_info_description: Once enabled, metrics will be available at:
metrics_settings.endpoint_auth_hint: Include the vault item as a Bearer token in the Authorization header when fetching metrics.

verify_2fa_page.title: Two-Factor Authentication
verify_2fa_page.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

verify_2fa_page.invalid_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
verify_2fa_page.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

not_found_page.title: Page Not Found
not_found_page.message: This page has vanished into thin air, just like our vault items do.
not_found_page.hint: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

error_boundary.title: Something Went Wrong
error_boundary.message: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.
error_boundary.hint: Don't worry, your vault items are still safe. Try refreshing the page.

secret_requests_page.title: Vault item Requests
secret_requests_page.description: Request vault items from others via secure links
secret_requests_page.no_requests: No vault item requests yet. Create one to get started.

link_modal.title: Creator Link
link_modal.description: Send this link to the person who should provide the vault item. They will be able to enter and encrypt the vault item using this link.
link_modal.warning: This link can only be used once. Once a vault item is submitted, the link will no longer work.

cancel_modal.title: Cancel Request
cancel_modal.message: Are you sure you want to cancel the request "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

create_request_page.title: Create Vault item Request
create_request_page.description: Request a vault item from someone by generating a secure link they can use to submit it

form.title_placeholder: e.g., AWS Credentials for Project X
form.description_placeholder: Provide additional context about what you need...
form.link_validity_hint: How long the creator link will remain active
form.secret_settings_description: These settings will apply to the vault item once it's created
form.password_hint: Recipients will need this passphrase to view the vault item
form.prevent_burn_label: Prevent auto-vanish (keep vault item even after max views)
form.webhook_description: Get notified when the vault item is submitted
form.webhook_url_hint: HTTPS recommended. A notification will be sent when the vault item is created.

success.title: Request Created!
success.description: Share the creator link with the person who should provide the vault item
success.webhook_secret_warning: Save this vault item now! It won't be shown again. Use it to verify webhook signatures.

toast.create_error: Failed to create vault item request

error.title: Request Unavailable
error.invalid_link: This link is invalid or has been tampered with.
error.not_found: This request was not found or the link is invalid.
error.already_fulfilled: This request has already been fulfilled or has expired.
error.generic: An error occurred while loading the request.

form.title: Submit a Vault item
form.description: Someone has requested that you share a vault item with them securely
form.password_protected_note: This vault item will be passphrase protected
form.encryption_note: Your vault item will be encrypted in your browser before being sent. The decryption key will only be included in the final URL you share.

success.title: Vault item Created!
success.description: Your vault item has been encrypted and stored securely
success.warning: Important: Copy this decryption key now and send it to the requester. This is the only time you will see it!
success.manual_send_note: You must manually send this decryption key to the person who requested the vault item. They already have the vault item URL in their dashboard.
